prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2022年理科最低位次约2475名，2023年约2708名，2024年约2226名，2025年因宁夏首次实施新高考（理科改为物理类），位次大幅后移至约5853名，较2024年后移约3627名，属于考试模式切换带来的结构性波动；该校在宁夏理科/物理类招生计划：2022年8人、2023年7人、2024年6人、2025年6人、2026年（招生计划文件）6人，2026年计划与2025年持平，未出现扩招或缩招，对竞争格局影响中性。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 北京工业大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年约第65名，较2025年第72名上升7位，排名回升对考生吸引力略有增强；该校2022年及2026年声誉记录均为偏负面，涉及拟录取研究生发表极端言论被取消资格等师德师风事件，对报考心理有一定抑制作用；抖音热度总排名第57位（较热），短视频平台曝光度中等偏上；近五年无投档线断档或暴跌记录；第五轮学科评估中，环境科学与工程获评A，光学工程、土木工程、材料科学与工程、软件工程获评A-，共5个A-及以上学科，工科实力均衡，对理工类考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 该校在宁夏招生的材料类（实验班）、建筑学、环境科学与工程类等专业，对应学科评估等级较高；宁夏2026年物理类考生估算约44,550人，较2025年44,491人基本持平，考生规模变化不大；北京工业大学位于北京市，属一线城市高校，对宁夏考生有较强地域吸引力；该校在全国招生规模较大，在宁夏招生占比极小，跨省竞争格局稳定。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年新高考首年位次大幅后移的结构性冲击、2026年招生计划持平、软科排名回升、学校声誉偏负面等因素，预计2026年宁夏物理类考生对新高考模式适应度提高，位次将较2025年小幅回升（竞争略加剧），预测最低位次约5733名，区间5233–6233名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 材料类（实验班）（色盲限报；含材料科学与工程、纳米材料与技术等）
- 建筑学（色盲、色弱限报；五年制）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 环境科学与工程类（色盲、色弱限报；含环境科学、环境工程）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 暂无其他专业在宁夏物理类招生（2026年计划仅上述3个专业各2人）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 北京工业大学2026年在宁夏物理类仅招3个专业各2人，招生人数极少。位次在预测区间5233–6233名内，建议以二档环境科学与工程类为主攻方向（学科A级），一档材料类（实验班）和建筑学作为冲刺；位次明显优于区间下限（5233名以内）可重点冲刺材料类实验班。由于招生人数极少，报考风险较高，建议同时准备保底院校。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2022, the minimum rank for science was approximately 2475, in 2023 about 2708, in 2024 about 2226, and in 2025, due to Ningxia's first implementation of the new college entrance examination (science changed to physics category), the rank significantly shifted back to about 5853, a backward shift of about 3627 compared to 2024, which is a structural fluctuation caused by the exam mode change; the university's enrollment plan in Ningxia for science/physics category: 8 in 2022, 7 in 2023, 6 in 2024, 6 in 2025, and 6 in 2026 (according to enrollment plan documents), the 2026 plan is the same as 2025, with no expansion or reduction, having a neutral impact on the competition landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Beijing University of Technology is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranks about 65th, up 7 places from 72nd in 2025, and the ranking recovery slightly enhances its appeal to candidates; the university's reputation records for 2022 and 2026 are both somewhat negative, involving incidents such as a proposed graduate student making extreme remarks leading to disqualification, which have a certain inhibitory effect on application psychology; Douyin heat total ranking is 57th (relatively hot), with medium to high exposure on short video platforms; there have been no records of cutoff line drops or crashes in the past five years; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Environmental Science and Engineering was rated A, Optical Engineering, Civil Engineering, Materials Science and Engineering, and Software Engineering were rated A-, totaling 5 disciplines rated A- or above, with balanced engineering strength, strongly attracting science and engineering candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The majors recruited by the university in Ningxia, such as Materials (Experimental Class), Architecture, and Environmental Science and Engineering, have high corresponding discipline evaluation grades; the estimated number of physics category candidates in Ningxia in 2026 is about 44,550, basically the same as 44,491 in 2025, with little change in candidate scale; Beijing University of Technology is located in Beijing, a first-tier city university, which has strong regional appeal to Ningxia candidates; the university has a large national enrollment scale, but its enrollment proportion in Ningxia is extremely small, and the cross-provincial competition pattern is stable.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the structural impact of the significant backward shift in rankings in the first year of the new college entrance exam in 2025, the unchanged enrollment plan in 2026, the recovery in Soft Science rankings, and the somewhat negative reputation of the university, it is expected that in 2026, Ningxia physics category candidates will have improved adaptation to the new exam model, and the ranking will slightly recover compared to 2025 (competition slightly intensifies), with a predicted minimum ranking of about 5733, in the range of 5233–6233.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Materials (Experimental Class) (color blindness restricted; includes Materials Science and Engineering, Nanomaterials and Technology, etc.)
- Architecture (color blindness and color weakness restricted; five-year program).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Environmental Science and Engineering (color blindness and color weakness restricted; includes Environmental Science, Environmental Engineering).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- No other majors recruiting physics category in Ningxia (2026 plan only includes the above 3 majors, each with 2 spots).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: In 2026, Beijing University of Technology only recruits 3 majors in Ningxia's physics category, each with 2 spots, with extremely few enrollment numbers. For rankings within the predicted range of 5233–6233, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 Environmental Science and Engineering (discipline rated A) as the main target, with Tier 1 Materials (Experimental Class) and Architecture as reach options; if the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 5233), prioritize reaching for the Materials Experimental Class. Due to the extremely small enrollment numbers, the application risk is high, so it is advisable to also prepare safety schools.
